data.tag: lmhg organic desktop trauma therapy Louisville KY

items.markdown:
[Louisville Health & Healing](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhFeGNHMHdkalptGAo) 

  
Provides specialized **EMDR and trauma therapy** for PTSD, anxiety, and complex trauma, with a focus on **long-term healing**.[[1]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhFeGNHMHdkalptGAo)[[2]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhKeU5IWmllRFY1GAo)  
[Lotus Counseling and Wellness Center](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVdnM1p6UnhjbkY2GAo) 

  
Features **Trauma Focused-CBT** and **Family System Trauma Therapy** , integrating **mind-body wellness** through yoga and reiki.[[1]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhKeU5IWmllRFY1GAo)[[2]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVdnM1p6UnhjbkY2GAo)  
[Blue Moon Therapy](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhaa00yeHRZbVl3GAo) 

  
Focuses on **neuro-therapies** like **EMDR and Brainspotting** to address the root causes of trauma and emotional distress.[[1]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhKeU5IWmllRFY1GAo)Show more

For specialized trauma care in Louisville, KY in 2026, **Grace Psychological Services** and **Thomas Banta Counseling** offer highly regarded EMDR and PTSD treatments. Other notable providers include **Lotus Counseling and Wellness Center** and **Blue Moon Therapy** . Many of these centers also offer virtual options and are accepting new clients as of July 2026.[](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/cognitive-processing-therapy-louisville-trauma/) [[1]](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/cognitive-processing-therapy-louisville-trauma/)[[2]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhrMmFIaGtjMng1GAo)[[3]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVdnM1p6UnhjbkY2GAo)[[4]](https://www.google.com/searchviewer/10?svid=CAwSHRIbCgNwdnESFENnMHZaeTh4TVhKeU5IWmllRFY1GAo)To find the best fit for your needs, are you looking for **in-person** 🏫 or **telehealth** 💻, and do you have a preference for **specialized techniques like EMDR** 🧠?
